ignoreCommand: if [ -z "$VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA" ]; then exit 1; fi; git cat-file -e "$VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA^{commit}" 2>/dev/null || exit 1; git diff --quiet "$VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA" HEAD -- src/ api/ public/ index.html package.json package-lock.json vite.config.ts tsconfig.json tsconfig.app.json vercel.json components.json tailwind.config.ts postcss.config.js
